text:
New handle, by devs for devs.

You can just build things.

Video made by Codex

Last week, Sam got to meet the true star of the India AI Impact Summit: 8-year old Ranvir Sachdeva.

He became the youngest speaker at the event when he took the stage to talk about how he is linking ancient Indian philosophies to modern day AI.

Here’s to the next generation of builders 👊
How to start building with AI using Codex (on Windows!!!) ✨ Download it on http://chatgpt.com/codex - it’s easier than you think 🙂‍↕️ @OpenAI #ChatGPTpartner

Codex now works across your entire computer.

Desktop apps. Connected tools and files. Long-running workflows.

It now goes beyond coding to help you gather context and turn it into clear next steps, create assets, remember how you like to work, and stay on top of recurring tasks.

Comment “Codex” for the link 🔗 

@openai just dropped a major update to Codex.

Here are some of the new features:

- Computer use: Codex gets its own cursor and can click through your actual Mac apps, test flows, and flag issues without you touching anything.

- ImageGen: Built-in image generation (gpt-image-1.5) generates images for real work, like creating assets for slides, mockups, UI, and games

- In-app browser: Preview and test UI, view artifacts for docs, sheets, and slides. Faster build, review, iterate loop

There’s a lot more, but I’ll let you try it out for yourself 🧑‍💻

#ChatGPTPartner

Day 15 of building my ML learning app: labs section

Using @openai Codex to turn real datasets into interactive labs where you can build and understand your own models 🙂‍↕️

Link in bio to obtain $100 in free credits (for US and Canada undergrad and grad students)

#ChatGPT_Partner #Codex

@openai just dropped a massive Codex update!

Computer Use lets Codex run automations on your Mac by controlling apps with simulated mouse and keyboard. It can literally act like a user, trying to break your app, fix it, and do it again.

I love the new in-app browser to help me test states, reproduce bugs, and drop comments right on the app to quickly run cleanup prompts.

So much more features that I’m still testing out , but already this is a whole different way to work.

#chatgptpartner
Driven by intelligence. ⚡️ Introducing the No. 10 OpenAI Honda, Alex Palou’s machine for the Acura Grand Prix of Long Beach, and the Freedom 250 Grand Prix of Washington, D.C.

Another season, another year of making history together. 🏁

OpenAI Researcher and Engineer, Joyce, is working hand-in-hand with @chipganassiracing in their pursuit of another IndyCar title.

There’s a new Pro tier in town. 

To celebrate the launch, we’re increasing Codex usage for a limited time through May 31st so that Pro $100 subscribers get up to 10x usage of ChatGPT Plus on Codex to build your most ambitious ideas.

Our existing $200 Pro tier still remains our highest usage option. And as a thank you to our existing Pro users on the $200 tier, we’re extending our 2x Codex usage promo (until May 31st) and we’ve reset your Codex rate limits (yes, again).
Greg Brockman, co-founder and President of OpenAI, sits down with @alexkantrowitz on the @bigtechnologypodcast to talk AI and how it can empower everyone.
